claim.summary: Example only: candidate preserves task quality while reducing context overhead.
claim.scope: Instruction-router and readiness guidance changes for a generated harness.

candidate.description: Candidate harness with explicit context-budget review guidance.

baseline.description: Baseline generated harness before the candidate guidance change.

taskSet.description: Example held-out repo tasks not used to design the candidate.
contaminationControls: Candidate author did not inspect held-out task prompts before final run.
Prompt and fixture identifiers are stored separately from candidate artifacts.

workspaceContract.state: Fresh checkout with repo-owned generated harness artifacts applied.
workspaceContract.dependencies: Dependencies installed through repo-owned setup commands only.
workspaceContract.networkAccess: Disabled except for documented package-manager caches.
workspaceContract.cleanup: Discard workspace after run and preserve only redacted result artifacts.

adapterContract.normalization: Same model policy, tool permissions, timeout, and prompt wrapper for baseline and candidate.
adapterContract.modelPolicy: Use the same supported default model for both arms.

notes: Example payload only. It is not a real benchmark result.
Promotion remains false until a target maintainer reviews real evidence.

promotion.rollback: Revert the candidate diff and restore the baseline harness artifact set.
